familySummaries.title: Your Graveyard To Hand
familySummaries.notes: High-volume self-recursion family; good for tightening direct target binding and context-driven return paths.

familySummaries.title: Dies Triggers Returning The Card To Battlefield
familySummaries.notes: Needs stronger antecedent binding from the dying object into the follow-up move-zone action.

familySummaries.title: Dies Triggers Returning The Card To Hand
familySummaries.notes: Similar contextual binding seam, but with hand destination instead of battlefield.

familySummaries.title: Pay-To-Return Deathmantle-Style Recursion
familySummaries.notes: Includes Nim Deathmantle-style payment + return + attachment bundles.

familySummaries.title: Entered Or Cast From Graveyard Checks
familySummaries.notes: Good follow-up once provenance is threaded more broadly across server and rules-engine paths.

familySummaries.title: Leave-Battlefield Exile Replacement Riders
familySummaries.notes: Important support glue for temporary recursion families such as unearth and similar reanimation effects.

familySummaries.title: Cast From Graveyard Permission Windows
familySummaries.notes: Useful for later test runs because these create lots of visible automation gaps when not modeled cleanly.

familySummaries.title: Play From Graveyard Permission Windows
familySummaries.notes: Covers lands and mixed play-permission text from graveyard.

familySummaries.title: Flashback Cards
familySummaries.notes: Stable, populous graveyard-casting family to validate once permission windows and replacement text are tightened.
